learning_phase.content: Please give a detailed explanation of our CI/CD pipeline.

Our CI/CD pipeline includes code checkout, dependency restoration, static analysis, unit/integration testing, artifact packaging, image building, vulnerability scanning, environment-specific configuration, canary deployment, automated rollback, and post-deploy monitoring with SLO alerting...
Cue detected: User replies became terse after long answer.

- Build & test
- Package & scan
- Deploy & monitor

- Tag commit
- Push tag
- Pipeline runs

- Select previous version
- Redeploy
- Verify health

interference_phase.content: I don't have real-time data; please check a weather app.
Download from python.org and follow the installer; on Linux, use your package manager.

instances.expected_pattern: The agent should respond with a brief, bullet-point overview recognizing prior impatience cues.
